debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount A R b s ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
have h_all := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  exact h_all.indepFun_of_disjoint (s := {p | p.1 = a}) (t := {p | p.1 = b})
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun p ha hb ↦ hab (ha.trans hb.symm))

have h1 := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream' h a
  have h2 := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream' h b
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν hab
  have h1' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h a
  have h2' := iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h b
  have h1'' : iIndepFun (fun n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) 𝔓' :=
    iIndepFun.precomp (g := fun n ↦ n + 1) (fun i j hij ↦ by grind) h1'
  have h2'' : iIndepFun (fun n ↦ rewardByCount A R b (n + 1)) 𝔓' :=
    iIndepFun.precomp (g := fun n ↦ n + 1) (fun i j hij ↦ by grind) h2'
  exact IdentDistrib.indepFun h1 h2 h1'' h2'' h_indep

have h_id_a := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream' h a
  have h_id_b := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream' h b
  exact (h_id_a.indepFun_iff h_id_b (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).mpr 
    (indepFun_eval_streamMeasure_of_ne ν hab)

have h_all := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω n b) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    indepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν hab
  exact h_all.indepFun_comp (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n)) h_indep

have h1 := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all h
  have h2 := iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  refine IndepFun.of_iIndepFun (s := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = a}) (t := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = b}) ?_ ?_ h2
  · ext ω
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · intro ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨(a, n - 1), rfl, by simp [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)]⟩
    · intro ⟨⟨a', m⟩, ha', h_eq⟩
      simp only at ha'
      subst ha'
      use m + 1, Nat.succ_ne_zero m
      convert h_eq using 1
  · ext ω
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · intro ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨(b, n - 1), rfl, by simp [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)]⟩
    · intro ⟨⟨b', m⟩, hb', h_eq⟩
      simp only at hb'
      subst hb'
      use m + 1, Nat.succ_ne_zero m
      convert h_eq using 1
  · intro ⟨⟨a', m⟩, ha'⟩ ⟨⟨b', n⟩, hb'⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ha' hb'
    subst ha' hb'
    simp [hab]
